api_token.description: Plausible Analytics API token, sent as a Bearer token. Never logged.

base_url.description: Plausible API base URL override for self-hosted instances, tests, or proxies.

site_id.description: Plausible site domain (site id); required for the aggregate, timeseries, and breakdown stats streams.

period.description: Plausible reporting period (e.g. 30d, 7d, month, custom) for the stats streams.

date.description: Optional date (or date range, for period=custom) for the stats streams.

property.description: Breakdown dimension for the breakdown stream (e.g. event:page, visit:source, visit:country). Only event:page (the default) is supported by this bundle's property_value projection; see docs.md's Known limits.

metrics.description: Optional comma-separated metrics override for the stats streams (e.g. visitors,pageviews).

filters.description: Optional Plausible filter expression for the stats streams.

compare.description: Optional Plausible comparison period for the stats streams.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
